# Scusa Media

> Detroit-based revenue systems agency. We help service-based and online businesses generate consistent, trackable revenue by integrating CRM automation, paid advertising, and conversion-focused content into one connected system.

## Quick Facts

- **Company:** Scusa Media LLC
- **Location:** Detroit, Michigan, United States
- **Founded:** 2023
- **Industries served:** Service-based businesses (construction, agencies, consultants, local services), online businesses (e-commerce, course creators, coaches), hospitality, financial services
- **Active client ad accounts managed:** 15+
- **Tracked client revenue generated:** $2.4M+
- **Average client return on ad spend:** 4.8x
- **Businesses scaled:** 50+
- **Contact:** info@scusamedia.com · +1 (586) 800-3734

## What Scusa Media Does

Scusa Media builds complete revenue systems — not isolated tactics. Every engagement integrates four pillars:

1. **CRM Automation** — Centralized lead capture, automated follow-up sequences (email + SMS), pipeline tracking, and reporting via GoHighLevel.
2. **Paid Advertising** — Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and Google ad campaigns built around revenue attribution, not vanity metrics. Includes creative production, audience targeting, and ongoing optimization.
3. **Lead Generation** — Landing pages, funnels, and conversion-focused content engineered to turn ad clicks into booked appointments and closed deals.
4. **Content Creation** — Social-media campaigns and video content with measurable business outcomes, not just engagement.

The differentiator: every piece works together. Ad spend feeds the CRM, the CRM feeds the follow-up sequences, the sequences feed the sales pipeline, and the entire system reports back on revenue per dollar spent.

## Case Studies (selected results)

- **Premier Spirits / Online brand:** 305% sales growth, 7.59x ROAS, conversion rate lifted from 1.33% to 3.12%.
- **Sterling Construction:** 20% revenue increase, more booked jobs, stronger brand presence after rebuilding their digital lead flow.
- **Roofing client:** Dead pipeline to $100K+ in new job opportunities within 48 hours of launching the system.
- **Premium spirits brand (B2B-only):** 125% sales growth into Marriott, Hilton, and Cambria, with FOX 17 coverage and zero ad spend (pure content + B2B outreach).
- **Detroit Auto Show, Nike, Mike Posner, Wentworth Real Estate, Premier Paving, Beautiful Machine Magazine, DCFC West, Salvation Army, Braun Construction, Superfeet, Upper Cutz** — additional clients spanning consumer, hospitality, real estate, and nonprofit.

## Frequently Asked Questions

- **What types of businesses do you work with?** Service-based businesses (construction, agencies, consultants, local services) and online businesses (e-commerce, course creators, coaches).
- **How long does it take to see results?** Most clients see initial results within 30 days. Full system optimization typically takes 60-90 days.
- **What's included in a revenue system?** CRM setup and automation, paid advertising, landing pages and funnels, email/SMS follow-up sequences, analytics dashboards, and ongoing optimization.
- **How much does it cost?** Custom-quoted after a free 30-minute consulting call. Flexible engagement models — no long-term contracts required.
- **Do you require long-term contracts?** No. Minimum 90-day engagement recommended to see meaningful results, but clients can leave at any time.
- **What makes Scusa Media different?** We build complete revenue systems where every piece (CRM, ads, content, automation) works together and is tracked against actual revenue, not vanity metrics.

## Tech Stack

GoHighLevel (CRM), Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, Vercel (deployments), proprietary content production pipeline.
